input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.4.3
            TITLE: the side impact structure must be comprised of three or more tubular members located on

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.4.3: The Side Impact Structure must be comprised of three or more tubular members located on
F.6.4.3 The Side Impact Structure must be comprised of three or more tubular members located on 
each side of the driver while seated in the normal driving position

final_answer: The Side Impact Structure must be comprised of three or more tubular members located on each side of the driver while seated in the normal driving position
